_meta.description: Reasoning scaffolds for operations analysis tasks.

scaffolds.name: SLA Compliance Check
steps: Extract SLA targets and their measurement criteria
Capture actual metric values for the reporting period
Compare actual vs target for each SLA line item
Identify breaches, near-misses, and compliant items
Return compliance summary with cited evidence and breach details

scaffolds.name: Maintenance Schedule Analysis
steps: Extract scheduled maintenance activities with due dates and frequency
Cross-reference completed maintenance entries from the log
Identify overdue, upcoming, and completed tasks
Flag equipment with missed preventive maintenance windows
Provide neutral assessment of schedule adherence and risk areas

scaffolds.name: Incident Root Cause Analysis
steps: Extract incident details including timeline, location, and severity
Identify contributing factors and immediate causes cited in the report
Map causal chain from trigger event to observed impact
Check whether corrective actions are documented and assigned
Summarize root cause findings with confidence and evidence gaps

scaffolds.name: Production Throughput Analysis
steps: Extract production output quantities and time periods
Calculate throughput rate and compare against capacity targets
Identify bottleneck indicators such as downtime events or low OEE
Check cycle time consistency across shifts or production lines
Return throughput summary with variance analysis and cited data
